calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam for Jia Li (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it read the papers and is satisfied that the petition should be granted. The Court also noted that no one is present to object. The Court granted the Petition for Modification of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
